'''Buamlon Central''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Buamlon Central system/Legends|system of the same name]], situated in the [[Esstran sector/Legends|Esstran sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> It was a dangerous world, and was staked by [[Barosa Warren]], a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] serving with the [[Republic Survey Corps/Legends|Republic Survey Corps]].<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>
